suggestions.topic: EIP-8037 simplification and testing complexity resolution
suggestions.rationale: ACDE #235 explicitly requested simplification exploration before this call. Testing team reports 30% test breakage and significant complexity concerns. This is blocking bal-devnet-4 progress and threatens Hegotá timeline.

suggestions.topic: Glamsterdam DevNet 0 status and merge decision with ePBS
suggestions.rationale: DevNet 0 targeted launch on April 24 (day after ACDE #235). Critical decision point for whether to proceed with combined Glamsterdam+ePBS testing or maintain separate tracks. Determines bal-devnet-4 necessity.

suggestions.topic: EIP-7979 (CALLSUB/RETURNSUB) and EIP-8163 (0xAE opcode reservation) review
suggestions.rationale: Both marked PFI for Hegotá in ACDE #235. Breakout call for 7979 was scheduled but status unclear. Need formal CFI decision or rejection for both proposals.

AA breakout call requested in ACDE #234 but no follow-up in #235. Frame transactions is CFI'd as non-headliner, but competing proposals (Scheme transactions, Wallet Title Deeds) exist. Need to clarify inclusion strategy and priority.
Selected for implementation in ACDE #235 (reorg support to finalized). Need status update from client teams and confirmation of readiness for DevNet integration.
CFI'd in ACDE #233 with Geth prototype complete. No client feedback reported in #234 or #235. Need to confirm other teams have reviewed and assess readiness.
ACDE #234 noted emerging consensus around 1 month minimum. Discord discussion requested but no follow-up in #235. Need formal decision if consensus solidified.
